scripts.generate: npm run export:mobile-openapi && npm run generate:android && npm run generate:ios
scripts.generate:android: bash scripts/with-java.sh openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi-mobile.json -g kotlin -c openapi-generator/android-kotlin.yml -o generated/android
scripts.generate:ios: bash scripts/with-java.sh openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi-mobile.json -g swift5 -c openapi-generator/ios-swift.yml -o generated/ios
